subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Threshold of the All-Knowing God! That which thou didst write was perused, and all that thou didst inscribe was understood [3.5s]... ...By the term “that true and radiant morn” mentioned in the Hidden Words is meant the Dawn of divine Revelation when the Exalted One manifested Himself
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان ایزد دانا آنچه مرقوم نمودی ملحوظ گردید هر چه نگاشتی مفهوم شد
subcodes.subjects: @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @personal instructions
